functions.name: udp.ba.utils.array_copy
documentation:
Copies an array from the specified source array, beginning at the
specified position, to the specified position of the destination array.
A sub-sequence of array components are copied from the source array
referenced by src to the destination array referenced by dest.
The number of components copied is equal to the length argument.
The components at positions srcPos through srcPos+length-1 in the
source array are copied into positions destPos through destPos+length-1,
respectively, of the destination array.

```
param src

the source array.

param src_pos

starting position in the source array.

param dest

the destination array.

param dest_pos

starting position in the destination data.

param length

the number of array elements to be copied.

return

```

documentation: Check whether buffers equal with range [offset, offset + size)

methods.name: udp.mtp.header.Header.__init__
documentation:
Create package header

```
param data

bytes, bytearray, Data or Header object

param data_type

package body data type

param sn

transaction ID

param pages

fragment count [OPTIONAL], default is 1

param index

fragment index [OPTIONAL], default is 0

param body_length

length of body, default is -1 (unlimited)
```

documentation: fragment index

class_variables.name: udp.mtp.header.Header.MAX_BODY_LENGTH
documentation: 1GB

class_variables.name: udp.mtp.header.Header.MAX_PAGES
documentation: 1GB

Max Length for message package body
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Each message package before split should not more than 1GB,
so the max pages should not more than about 2,000,000.

documentation:
Get inner buffer

```
return

bytearray when it's mutable, or bytes for immutable
```

documentation:
Get view offset

```
return

0 ~ (len(buffer) - 1)
```

documentation:
Get view size

```
return

0 ~ (len(buffer) - offset)
```

```
return

hex string
```

documentation:
Get item value with position

```
param index

position

return

item value
```

methods.name: udp.ba.array.ByteArray.get_bytes
documentation:
Get bytes from inner buffer with range \[offset, offset + length)

```
param start

begin position relative to offset (include)

param end

end position relative to offset (exclude)

return

data bytes
```

methods.name: udp.ba.array.ByteArray.find
documentation:
Search sub data/buffer within range \[start, end)

```
param sub

element value; or sub bytes; or sub array

param start

begin position relative to self.offset (include)

param end

end position relative to self.offset (exclude)

return

first position where sub occurred; -1 on not found
```

documentation:
Change byte value at this position

```
param index

position

param value

byte value
```

methods.name: udp.ba.array.MutableByteArray.update
documentation:
Update values from source data/buffer with range \[start, end)

```
param index

update buffer from this relative position

param source

source data/buffer

param start

source start position (include)

param end

source end position (exclude)
```

documentation:
Append values from source data/buffer/value with range \[start, end)

```
param source

source data/buffer

param start

source start position (include)

param end

source end position (exclude)
```

methods.name: udp.ba.array.MutableByteArray.insert
documentation:
Append values from source data/buffer/value with range \[start, end)

```
param index

insert buffer from this relative position

param source

source data/buffer

param start

source start position (include)

param end

source end position (exclude)
```

methods.name: udp.ba.array.MutableByteArray.remove
documentation:
Remove element at this position and return its value

```
param index

position

return

element value removed
```

methods.name: udp.ba.array.MutableByteArray.shift
documentation:
Remove element from the head position and return its value

```
return

element value at the first place
```

methods.name: udp.ba.array.MutableByteArray.pop
documentation:
Remove element from the tail position and return its value

```
return

element value at the last place
```

methods.name: udp.ba.array.MutableByteArray.push
documentation:
Append the element to the tail

```
param element

value
```

documentation: Host Byte Order

SOFTWARE.

methods.name: udp.channel.ChannelChecker.check_error
documentation:
Check socket error

   (1) check E_AGAIN
       the socket will raise 'Resource temporarily unavailable'
       when received nothing in non-blocking mode,
       or buffer overflow while sending too many bytes,
       here we should ignore this exception.
   (2) check timeout
       in blocking mode, the socket will wait until send/received data,
       but if timeout was set, it will raise 'timeout' error on timeout,
       here we should ignore this exception

methods.name: udp.channel.ChannelChecker.check_data
documentation:
Check data received from socket

(1) check timeout
    in blocking mode, the socket will wait until received something,
    but if timeout was set, it will return nothing too, it's normal;
    otherwise, we know the connection was lost.
